title: Core Prepositions: A, De, En, Con
summary: The individual core meanings of a, de, en, and con (direction/time/indirect-object, origin/possession/material, location/transport/time-span, accompaniment/instrument/manner), a reminder of the al/del contraction from Chapter 3, a reference list of common verbs that govern one of these prepositions before a noun or pronoun object, and personal a — the animacy-and-specificity marker before a direct object with no English equivalent.
